resource "aws_eks_cluster" "production" {
name = "prod-k8s-cluster"
version = "1.29"
tags = {
Environment = "production"
ManagedBy = "terraform"
}

02.

About
Me

Available for work
Remote / Hybrid

My journey into DevOps began with a passion for automation and building reliable infrastructure. I transitioned from traditional development to focus on the critical aspects of modern software delivery: automating processes, establishing CI/CD pipelines, and containerizing applications.

What drives my work is the pursuit of efficiency and reliability. I specialize in using Infrastructure as Code (primarily Terraform) to provision cloud resources, implementing Kubernetes for orchestration, and designing CI/CD pipelines that enable teams to deploy with confidence.

"Committed to continuous learning, staying current with cloud technologies, and sharing knowledge with the community."

I believe in the philosophy of continuous improvement—both in infrastructure and in my own growth as an engineer. Whether it's exploring new tools, improving system performance, or mentoring others, I'm always looking for ways to elevate my craft.

Terraform
Kubernetes
AWS
Docker
CI/CD
GitOps
Helm
Linux
03.

Key Focus
Areas

01
⚡

Automation

Building automated workflows and scripts to reduce manual processes, improve consistency, and accelerate deployment cycles.

02
🔄

CI/CD Pipelines

Designing and implementing robust continuous integration and deployment pipelines that enable teams to ship code reliably and quickly.

03
📦

Containerization

Leveraging Docker and container technologies to ensure applications are portable, scalable, and efficient across different environments.

04
🏗️

Infrastructure as Code

Provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure using Terraform—reproducible, version-controlled, and maintainable at scale.

04.

cations

05.

Featured
Projects

01

Terraform AWS Infrastructure

Provisioning of AWS VPC, EC2, and networking using Terraform. Showcases IaC best practices, modular architecture, and state management.

Terraform AWS VPC EC2
02

Kubernetes Deployment Pipeline

End-to-end CI/CD pipeline for containerized applications using Kubernetes. Automated testing, image building, and rolling deployments with health checks.

Kubernetes Docker CI/CD Helm
03

Multi-Environment Infrastructure

Infrastructure across dev, staging, and production environments using Terraform modules and GitOps principles for consistency.

Terraform AWS GitOps Automation
06.

Let's build
something great

I'm always interested in discussing DevOps challenges, infrastructure automation, and how we can build more reliable systems together.
